main.name: Pudi Bhanu Swaroop
main.tagline: Problem Solver · Systems Thinker · Product Enthusiast
main.intro: I am a problem solver who enjoys working in ambiguous environments and using critical thinking to deeply understand problems. Through structured thinking, storytelling, and effective communication, I aim to streamline processes, collaborate across teams, and bring ideas to life.

projects.title: Mitra.ai — Private AI Memory System
projects.shortDesc: Top 8 at Product Arena 3.0. Privacy-first AI memory tool built on 50-respondent primary research and 51 competitor tools analyzed.

projects.title: Tata Neu — Gen Z User Engagement Strategy
projects.shortDesc: Hooked Model diagnosis of Tata Neu's habit gap. Proposed Neu-Twin: a gamified smart lock screen feature to drive daily engagement.

projects.title: Frescos Pizza — Brand & Growth Strategy
projects.shortDesc: Go-to-market strategy for a wood-fired pizza brand at IIT Hyderabad. 3-pillar plan targeting 255 customers and ₹51,000 revenue.

repos.title: Kerataconus Classification System
repos.description: ML pipeline for keratoconus detection using Random Forest on corneal topography data from clinical eye datasets.

repos.title: End-to-End RAG-Based AI Content Review Platform for Sunshine, IITH
repos.description: RAG-based assistant for the Sunshine Counselling Cell at IITH to help content, design and publicity teams review and verify content.

repos.title: Zepto Retention Analytics
repos.description: Churn prediction pipeline with SQL feature mart, RF classifier (AUC 0.79), SHAP explainability, and CLV-tiered intervention engine.

experiences.company: BHIOVS Research Centre, LV Prasad Eye Institute (LVPEI)
